nasb.text: For her wound is incurable, For it has come to Judah; It has reached the gate of my people, Even to Jerusalem.

esv.text: For her wound is incurable, and it has come to Judah; it has reached to the gate of my people, to Jerusalem.

cnv.text: 因為撒瑪利亞的創傷無法醫治， 並且殃及猶大， 直逼我子民的城門， 就是耶路撒冷。

ccb.text: 因为撒玛利亚的创伤无法救治， 已经祸及犹大， 直逼我百姓的城门，直逼耶路撒冷。
